## X-Sense Home Security v1.3.15.14

### 🔔 Notifications
- Updates the camera recording notification path so a freshly cached event recording replaces the matching recording-index entry instead of being skipped as a duplicate.
- Keeps the notification tap target aligned with the cached recording shown in the X-Sense Recordings panel.

### 🎥 Recordings
- Prevents a notification-opened recording from landing on an older not-ready copy when the same clip already exists in the recording history index.

### ✅ Validation
- Adds regression coverage for event-cached recordings updating matching indexed clips.
- Validates the integration with the full test suite.
